Off Calendar Jul-13-2015 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-29-2015 Continued To Jul-13-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Adam Lazar specially appearing for John Ransom.

This matter had been pre-granted, Mr. Lazar appeared to object to the pre-grant.
Mr. Lazar reported that there is a deposited will number PDW-03-049993 and requested that it be reviewed prior to granting the request to appoint the executor. The petition for probate of will and for letters testamentary was continued to July 13, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
